name: Observed Baryonic Spectrum
description: Real cosmological particle abundances by epoch. Densities are number densities in comoving units (per cubic meter). Time in years from Big Bang.
notes: Values are approximate placeholders pending verification against PDG/Planck data

L1.name: Leptonic Neutrinos
L1.description: Cosmic Neutrino Background - decoupled from thermal plasma at ~1 second, carrying non-zero rest mass

L2.name: Hadrons
L2.description: Protons and neutrons - formed at BBN epoch (~1 second to 3 minutes)

L3.name: Atoms
L3.description: Hydrogen and helium atoms - formed at recombination (~379,000 years)
